channel.title: JavaScript on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in JavaScript on My Hugo

item.title: Common NPM Modules
item.description: Modules and Size Method 1. create folder, edit package.json for the specified module 2. run npm update 3. run du -sh . Name Size Description express+axios 3.7M mini web framework + promise based http client better-sqlite3 23M The fastest and simplest library for SQLite3 in Node.js. fast-xml-parser 372k Validate XML or Parse XML to JS/JSON very fast without C/C++ based libraries js-yaml 1.

item.title: VisualStudio Code and Javascript
item.description: Project Configuration SC-P open action menu, type javascript and choose “Go to project configuration” Create/Edit jsconfig.json at the workspace root ${workspaceFolder}/jsconfig.json by defaut it looks like { "compilerOptions": { "module": "commonjs", "target": "es2016", "jsx": "preserve" }, "exclude": [ "node_modules", "**/node_modules/*" ] } Debugging Click Debug icon in #Activity Bar# to activate the Debug view Click gear icon at the top of the Debug view to create/modify launch.

item.title: Access DOM Element In External Resource
item.description: Use Case How do we access DOM elements in external resource, such as <object> or <iframe>? <iframe id="my-frame" src="other-page.html"> </iframe> <object id="my-obj" type="image/svg+xml" data="my-url.svg"> </object> <div>normal DOM elements</div> For example, following is the external my-url.svg <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <rect id="r1" x="10" y="10" width="300" height="200" fill="yellow"/> </svg> The anwser is the property contentDocument of the object/iframe element. var svg_doc = document.getElementById('my-obj').contentDocument var rect = svg_doc.getElementById('r1')
